rulings.Case Title: THE MILLS BUILDING, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL VS. OUTCO, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2022 line 1. DEFENDANT ANDY TRAN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is DENIED. Plaintiff provided sufficient evidence showing that Defendant is an out of state resident. Thus, service by mail was proper under CCP Section 415.40. Plaintiff will not be reimbursed for costs of service. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: THE MILLS BUILDING, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL VS. OUTCO, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS

DEFENDANT OUTCO, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is DENIED. Subservice on Defendant's employee plus mailing constitutes valid substitute service. rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC VS. MANUEL NAVARRO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Defendant'S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2022 line 5. PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.S NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. To be entitled to reconsideration, a party should show that (1) evidence of new or different facts exist, and (2) the party has a satisfactory explanation for failing to produce such evidence at an earlier time. (Mink v. Superior Court (1992) 2 Cal.App.4th 1338, 1342.) Plaintiff failed to show these requirements. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC VS. MANUEL NAVARRO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Relief From Judgment Motion To Set Aside And Vacate The Courts Order Granting Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 10, 2022 line 5. PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM JUDGMENT MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE THE COURTS ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Plaintiff has not established "excusable mistake" pursuant to CCP Section 473. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
